exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Wide overhand grip. Full stretch at top, drive elbows to hips.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Close neutral grip. Pull to lower sternum, pause 1 sec at peak contraction.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Rope attachment, pull to forehead height, externally rotate at end. Light — this is a health exercise.

exercises.name: DB Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Supinate fully at top. No swinging.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Neutral grip throughout. Targets brachialis and forearm.
